title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 examines why AI currently falls short of human performance in reliably editing complex documents like Word files. The challenge stems from document structure and internal logic that requires treating documents as software rather than plain text to enable reliable AI-assisted editing at scale.
